step_rationale: TIMP inhibits MMP-driven ECM degradation; maintains fibrous cap integrity.
mechanism: TIMP2 suppresses matrix metalloproteinase activity, protecting fibrous-cap collagen from degradation.

references.title: Meta-Analysis of Extracellular Matrix Dynamics after Myocardial Infarction Using RNA-Sequencing Transcriptomic Database.
Novel biomarkers in the prognosis of patients with atherosclerotic coronary artery disease.
